commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
Adds an optional archive-error callback for session transcript archiving, wires `/new` reset rotation to log previous-transcript archive failures, adds regression coverage, and updates the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible. Current main catches and ignores `archiveFileOnDisk` failures inside `archiveSessionTranscriptsDetailed`, and the source PR proof exercises the same rename failure boundary with a real filesystem permission error.
commands.review_followup: No repair job is needed; the remaining action is normal exact-head required-check gating and the existing ClawSweeper automerge flow.
